headline: Consul (HashiCorp)
description: HashiCorp Consul (2014) is a service mesh and service discovery tool. It provides: service registration + health checking, key-value store, secure service-to-service communication (mTLS + authorization), and multi-datacenter support. Service mesh: sidecar proxy (Envoy) routes and secures traffic.

citation.name: Service Discovery and Service Mesh in Cloud-Native (2025 Survey)
citation.author: multiple
